hero.title: Free Online
hero.description: Reduce image file size while maintaining quality. Perfect for web optimization and faster loading times.

dropzone.maxSize: Max 5MB per file • Up to 10 images per upload

settings.qualityExplainer: Most users can leave this at 85% for excellent visual quality with strong compression. Adjust only if you need very small files (lower) or near-lossless output (95-100%).

privacy.title: Data & Privacy
privacy.notice: All processing local + server-side transient, no files stored.
privacy.p1: Your images are processed on-the-fly. Originals stay in your browser; compressed results are streamed back immediately.
privacy.p2: No permanent storage: the server keeps temporary buffers just long enough to encode & deliver the result, then memory is released.
privacy.p3: No analytics on image content; only anonymous aggregate performance counters may be collected (sizes, timings) for optimization.
privacy.p4: Close the tab any time after processing completes. While processing, avoid closing to prevent interruption.

results.settingsChanged: Settings have changed! Click "Apply New Settings" to re-compress your images with the new quality configuration.

howTo.title: How To Compress
howTo.step1Desc: Drag and drop JPEG, PNG, or WebP files. No sign-up required and everything processes instantly.
howTo.step2Desc: Use the slider to balance visual clarity against maximum file size reduction for faster websites.
howTo.step3Desc: Get your ultra-light images one by one or neatly packed in a ZIP file to save bandwidth.

features.title: Key Features
features.blazingFastDesc: Smaller image files guarantee faster page loads and improved Core Web Vitals.
features.privacyDesc: Everything shrinks locally. We never upload or store your private images.
features.bulkDesc: Process multiple large photos simultaneously and download them in one ZIP file.
features.lossyLosslessDesc: Automatically tune algorithms for the best savings without sacrificing pixels.
features.seoDesc: Search engines penalize sluggish sites. Compressed images keep you ranking high.
features.bandwidthDesc: Dramatically reduce data consumption for mobile visitors globally.

qualityGuide.title: Quality vs Size Guide
qualityGuide.interactiveDemo: Interactive demo: See how quality affects file size in real-time

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How does image compression improve SEO?
faq.a1: Massive images cause slow page loads, which hurts your Core Web Vitals. By reducing your file sizes (often by up to 80%), your pages load instantly, resulting in better search engine rankings.
faq.q2: Is there any quality loss when shrinking images?
faq.a2: Most compression is 'lossy' but practically invisible to the human eye. By keeping the quality slider between 75% and 85%, you get substantial size reduction while retaining crisp visuals.
faq.q3: What's the best format for maximum file size reduction?
faq.a3: Modern formats like WebP and AVIF offer vastly superior compression algorithms compared to older JPEG and PNG formats, allowing for smaller files at the exact same quality.
faq.q4: Are my private local photos secure?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Browsers execute our tool's code locally without uploading to a remote server. Your private data remains 100% on your device.
faq.q5: Can I compress images in bulk?
faq.a5: Yes, you can drop up to 10 images at once. The tool processes them all simultaneously and lets you download a compressed ZIP archive.
